finding_results.notes: Replaced the abstract data-versus-absence restatement with a concrete symptom-reporting attempt, an explicit decision not to report the blackout without telemetry proof, and a changed bedtime behavior centered on the display and link port.

summary: Revised the chapter ending so the missing-time realization leads to a concrete consequence instead of explanatory paraphrase: Lena checks the symptom menu, withholds the episode because the log cannot prove it, and changes how she lies down and watches the system at lights-out.
